TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Cole Aldrich unu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, u tebanay mimaliay . Cole Aldrich i 2010 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 11, namapili' tu nu New Orleans Hornets putiput. Cole Aldrich nalecuhan i Burnsville, Minnesota. 10 bulad 31 demiad, 1988 a mihca, Cole Aldrich, miunduay. u puenengan nu kakitizaan niza sa, u tebanay mimaliay.
S.PHON: ¶or~…æ…ô ar~…ædri ¶ƒß unu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, u t…ôbanaj mimar~…æiaj . ¶or~…æ…ô ar~…ædri ¶ƒß i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu n…ôw orr~…æ…ôans ƒßorn…ôts putiput. ¶or~…æ…ô ar~…ædri ¶ƒß nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i burns*ir~…ær~…æ…ô, minn…ôsota. ** bur~…æad ** d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, ¶or~…æ…ô ar~…ædri ¶ƒß, miunduaj. u pu…ôn…ô≈ãan nu kakitizaan niza sa, u t…ôbanaj mimar~…æiaj.
S.FORM: Cole Aldrich unu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, u tebanay mimaliay . Cole Aldrich i 2010 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 11, namapili' tu nu New Orleans Hornets putiput. Cole Aldrich nalecuhan i Burnsville, Minnesota. 10 bulad 31 demiad, 1988 a mihca, Cole Aldrich, miunduay. u puenengan nu kakitizaan niza sa, u tebanay mimaliay.
